memoryArtifacts.headline: Amazing Grace: A Mother's Legacy, The Provincetown Independent, Nov. 17, 2021
memoryArtifacts.description: Newspaper article about Mrs. Grace Smith, widow of Ralph, of Eastham, just before her death in circa 1711, at 96 years.

zh.lifeSummary: Grace於大約1614年出生在英國。她於大約1639年與Ralph Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1711年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年99歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Grace于大约1614年出生在英国。她于大约1639年与Ralph Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼辛加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1711年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦享年99岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Grace was born about 1614, in England. She married Ralph Smith about 1639, in Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1711, in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 99, and was buried in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Grace è nata il circa 1614 nel England. Lei sposato Ralph Smith circa 1639, nel Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1711, nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 99 anni, e fu sepolta a Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Graceは約1614年にイギリスで生まれた。約1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヒンガムでRalph Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1711年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムで99歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace(은)는 대략 1614년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1639년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 잉함에서 Ralph Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1711년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Grace nasceu aproximadamente 1614, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Ralph Smith aproximadamente 1639, em Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1711, em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 99 anos, e foi sepultada em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Grace родилась около 1614 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Smith около 1639 г. в местности хингхам, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1711 г. в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Grace nació aproximadamente 1614, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Ralph Smith aproximadamente 1639, en Hingham, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1711, en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 99 años, y fue sepultada en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
